text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is over, and having undergone
Mejiro McQueen's transformative training, Mejiro
Bright is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Powwwerrr uuup! Look, everyone. Look at how
strong I've become.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Nice job, Bright! You got some good definition
going on!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Man, you toughened up this much over one summer? Whoa.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Goodness me. There's overprotective, and then there's whatever you're doing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That said, I did find it rather strange.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Bright's—well, the sheer speed of her
transformation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This summer, Bright set about bolstering her
stamina with the utmost earnestness. And as a
result...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Not only has her cardiopulmonary system
improved, but her physique is now strong enough
to endure long-distance races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I was certain she was best suited to
medium-distance races like you are, Ryan, but it
appears she has the aptitude for long distances as
well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Is it strange for bodies to change like that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No, if I had to say, the strange part would be her mental transformation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Even if someone adjusts their body to suit
long-distance races, the breathing techniques and
strategies needed to become a stayer are not so
easily learned.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, as soon as Bright had the physique for
them, she picked up everything else she needed
for long-distance races, too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If I didn't know better, I'd have thought she was a
stayer from the very start.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, if you had to summarize Bright in a single
word... what would it be?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Exactly! No matter what she does, she takes her time doing it. And yet, she got the knack for long-distance running frighteningly fast.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's almost as if, over the course of one summer,
she underwent a fundamental
transformation—from being like you, Ryan, to
being like me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: From me to you... Is that even possible?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've never taught Mejiro Bright anything about
long-distance racing myself...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What could have precipitated this change? Has
the Mejiro connection allowed Bright to gain
McQueen's aptitude?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Can talents be passed between family members
like that? It sounds almost supernatural...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Pardon me, Trainer. Is something the matter?
choice_data_list:
No, I'm fine. Let's keep working hard for the
Kikuka Sho.

No, I'm fine. Let's keep working hard for the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'll do whatever it takes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The mystery remains unsolved... Maybe future
races will bring us closer to the answer.
